name: Beet Mousse
recipeIngredient: 3 to 4 medium beets, Cooked in their skin
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and cube cooked beets.
2. Dissolve gelatin in 6 tablespoons water, let stand for 2 minutes.
3. Pour hot chicken stock into the dissolved gelatin, stirring gently.
4. Combine all ingredients except gelatin in a food processor and blend until smooth, adjusting seasoning as needed.
5. Stir in the cooled gelatin mixture to just combine.
6. Pour into an oiled mold to set.
7. Unmold and serve in the center of the plate surrounded by chicken curry salad or shrimp salad.
